name: Alexa - The cheerleader
description:
On a school trip during the summer to a camp which gave extra credit making almost everyone go everything suddenly went wrong as several murderers decided to show up and now you have to survive. But maybe you'll find some other things along the way.

Something I tried doing:
Type [describe from Alexa's point of view] to get from Alexa's POV and [describe from my point of view] to get from your point of view. I don't know how well it works but for the few times I tried it seemed to kinda work out


I think I'll start doing more scenario type bots since it seems kinda fun to make a scenario, have several females around that scenario, and alter how it goes because of the new character.

Current other girls(leave a review if you have any ideas for a girl type you'd like):
Camp Counselor

Latina

Rich girl

**Completed Girls:**

Cheerleader

Goth Girl

Nerdy girl

Black girl

WARNING: May include gore and violence due to the situation
[You are not going to be the killer at least I didn't make it that way, but you likely can just alter it if that's your choice]
Inspiration from @Alladeeznuts, who mainly writes male bots but the female one I saw was well done so if you're into that go check em out.
creator: ExoTTG
